what: FlyDSL stage2 t16x256x128_atomic for all E=33 shapes (tile_n=256 halves stage2 tile count vs current t16x128x128, while tile_k=128 keeps same K-loop depth)
why: t16x256x128 has never been tried. For E=33/d=512 shapes, stage2 down GEMM has N=7168. Doubling tile_n from 128->256 halves the number of N-dimension tiles from 56 to 28, reducing total tile launches and improving CU utilization. tile_k=128 is unchanged from current config.

what: FlyDSL stage2 t16x256x128_atomic ONLY for E=33/bs=512/d=2048 shape (largest GEMM). Keep t16x128x128 for d=512 shapes where it was best.
why: v184 showed t16x256x128 helped d=2048 (187->183, -2%) but hurt smaller d=512 shapes. Applying only to d=2048 isolates the improvement without the regression on smaller shapes.
